steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice best explains the relationship between ITUC-Africa and the BFTU using the notes. The key facts are: ITUC-Africa is a regional federation that represents national union federations across Africa, and it specifically represents the BFTU. A correct answer must connect both organizations.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ITUC-Africa is a regional union federation.: Describes ITUC-Africa alone. Says nothing about the BFTU or the relationship between the two organizations. ✗
  • Choice B — The BFTU is one of the national union federations represented by ITUC-Africa.: Directly states the relationship — ITUC-Africa represents the BFTU — by combining the notes that ITUC-Africa represents national federations and that it represents the BFTU specifically. ✓
  • Choice C — National union federations, such as the BFTU, work to improve conditions for workers in their member nations.: Focuses on what the BFTU does for workers, not on its relationship with ITUC-Africa. ITUC-Africa is not mentioned. ✗
  • Choice D — The BFTU is a national union federation.: Describes the BFTU alone. Says nothing about ITUC-Africa or the relationship between the two. ✗
B is correct.
